line: # Packet telemetry demo for MIPS32: naïve façade, 世界, and signal 🚦
# Strings and comments deliberately include BMP and astral Unicode safely.

ruleStack: [(1, source.mips, source.mips),(18, source.mips string.quoted.double.mips, source.mips string.quoted.double.mips)]

line: # Program entry prints a banner, aggregates samples, and updates an average.
# Sum a word vector while exercising a conventional counted loop.
# Return a compact set of comparison flags for a signed sample.
# Copy an arbitrary byte count; fast paths use unaligned pseudo-loads.
# Decode fields that may cross a packet alignment boundary.
# Mix a key using multiply/divide results and rotate pseudo-instructions.
# Floating-point pipeline with loads, conversions, comparisons, and stores.
# An LL/SC loop performs an atomic increment at a caller-provided address.
# Guard routine demonstrates conditional moves and architectural traps.
# Coprocessor-zero handler uses reserved registers only in kernel text.
